hero.title: The Magnificent Seven
hero.reason: In honor of Nature Photography Day, we celebrate the breathtaking landscapes showcased in this classic Western film, which adds to its timeless appeal.
hero.blurb: With its stunning cinematography and memorable cast, this film is a must-watch for fans of the genre. The combination of action, drama, and scenic vistas makes for an unforgettable viewing experience.

released.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this superhero sequel brings exciting action sequences and visually stunning effects, making it a fun summer blockbuster.
released.blurb: This film offers an enjoyable mix of humor, adventure, and sci-fi elements, with a talented cast that brings the iconic characters to life. The special effects hold up well even years later, making for an entertaining watch.

birthday.title: Father of the Bride
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Courteney Cox, born June 15, 1964, who shines in this charming family comedy alongside Steve Martin.
birthday.blurb: This lighthearted, hilarious film explores the challenges and joys of family life, with a talented cast that delivers both laughter and heart. Courteney Cox brings her signature charm to the role, making this a standout performance in her career.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This infamous thriller is often cited as one of the worst films of the 2000s, with a convoluted plot and poor acting that makes for a cringeworthy watch.
awful.blurb: With a messy narrative and unimpressive performances, this film is a trainwreck that's so bad it's almost fascinating. Lindsay Lohan's dual roles are more confusing than compelling, adding to the overall disappointing experience.
